system.deployment_context: Three LLM agents collaborate via natural-language context exchange to produce research reports. Each agent has a persona prompt. Output is advisory only; humans review before any action. Deployed across multiple enterprise tenants.

delta_adv.analysis_summary: Open-web retrieval exposes agent to prompt injection from any visited page. Mitigations: output is advisory-only. Adversarial analysis incomplete.

components.notes: Open-world by design — consumes unfiltered web content and peer agent NL output.

delta_adv.analysis_summary: Receives NL from researcher-agent without typed interface. No independent model family.
Receives NL from both peers; same substrate LLM. Concealment-attack surface analysed but not closed.

composition.chain_description: Three agents exchange NL context peer-to-peer. No typed interfaces. Shared LLM substrate across all three.

I1.evidence_summary: LLM sampling is non-deterministic (temperature > 0); re-runs produce different outputs. Deterministic execution not achievable under current architecture without fundamental rework.

I2.evidence_summary: Application logs retained in ELK; not signed, not hash-chained, not externally anchored. Logs are mutable at rest by administrators.

I3.evidence_summary: Persona prompts are edited in-place in a shared config; no versioning; no policy_snapshot_id field exists in logs.

I4.evidence_summary: Multi-tenant deployment shares LLM provider endpoints and session caches. Cross-tenant contamination possible via shared context. Not tested.

I5.evidence_summary: Tenancy segregation at the data layer; no jurisdictional classification of data; cross-border LLM provider endpoints used.

I6.evidence_summary: Human approval before any action (A2 ceiling). However, no cryptographic verification of the approval token; approval is a click in a UI.

I7.evidence_summary: Three agents NL-coupled by architecture. Persona prompts do not bound coupling. Failing I7 is structural; cannot be closed without rearchitecture to typed interfaces and typed peer communication.

anti_patterns.evidence_reference: Persona prompts + NL peer coupling is the architecture.
critic-agent evaluates researcher-agent output; same model family; no ground-truth gate.

anti_patterns.demotion_path: Typed context slots planned for v2; current deployment packs all context as concatenated prompt.
Web retrieval restricted to whitelisted domains as of 2026-03; prior deployments were unrestricted.

anti_patterns.evidence_reference: Governance is exclusively post-hoc log review.
